title: [ScrewThisNoise][Illusion][Optional Studio Modpack] HoneySelect 2 DX (ハニーセレクト2 DX)/ AI-Shoujo / AI-Girl (ＡＩ*少女) BetterRepack Snapshot 20231012
description:
![BetterRepack 20231012](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img922/9937/BidvPU.png "BetterRepack 20231012")

### What is this?
As some of you may already know, the optional modpack is no longer distributed alongside main packs. This is that part for separate download.

### Why is this distributed separately?
The optional modpack is rapidly gaining weight, and not all users use studio, as such, distributing it separately makes it less likely that users that do not need the modpack will download it by mistake. This is very important for some users, especially those on limited data plans where downloading 200GB they don't intend to use is considered suboptimal.

Additionally, the process of uploading this alongside every pack creates a lot of problems on my side as well.

### So... Do I need this?
If you use, or plan to use, Studio, you absolutely will want this, as a lot of modded scenes won't load correctly without.

### How do I install this?
Just extract all of the 'Sideloader Modpack' folders to your Mods folder.

Links
DL: <https://dl.betterrepack.com/public>
(All download links are in here)

If you want to get notified about new releases, feel free to join my notification discord: https://discord.gg/pSGZ4uz

### Patreon

I'd very much appreciate it if you would all think about supporting me on patreon, but keep in mind that I won't paywall my packs, this is just for supporting me making my packs better :)

There is currently a direct download option exclusive to patreons, take a peek at [https://www.patreon.com/posts/trial-run-only-29049006] for more information. ~.~

![Patreon](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/575260461579108352/576067606566666260/PatreonBanner.png "Patreon")
